name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_uvw_jobs_all_attributes
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_jobs_all_attributes' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CreatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ScheduledStart` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ScheduledEnd` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ApprovalDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`AssignedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CompletedStatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`MadeSafeDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`ComplianceCalculationDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`CRMField6` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`JobStartChecklist-HotWorksPermit` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`JobStartChecklist-PlantPrestart` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`JobStartChecklist-StartCard` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`JobStartChecklist-VehicleMovementPlan` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`JobStartChecklist-WorkingatHeightsPermit` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`QAReview-JobStartFormSectionhasbeencompleted` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`QAReview-PlantPrestartAttached` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`QAReview-StartCardAttached` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`QAReview-Timesheetattachedandpopulated` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CreatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ScheduledStart` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ScheduledEnd` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ApprovalDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`AssignedDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CompletedStatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`MadeSafeDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`ComplianceCalculationDate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`CRMField6` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`JobStartChecklist-HotWorksPermit` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`JobStartChecklist-PlantPrestart` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`JobStartChecklist-StartCard` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`JobStartChecklist-VehicleMovementPlan` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`JobStartChecklist-WorkingatHeightsPermit` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`QAReview-JobStartFormSectionhasbeencompleted` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`QAReview-PlantPrestartAttached` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`QAReview-StartCardAttached` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`QAReview-Timesheetattachedandpopulated` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'DeltaUTC|ModifiedUTC|ModifiedUser|CreatedDate|DueDate|ScheduledStart|ScheduledEnd|CompletedDate|ApprovalDate|AssignedDate|CompletedStatus|CreatedUser|CompletedUser|MadeSafeDateUTC|ComplianceCalculationDate|CRMField6|JobStartChecklist-HotWorksPermit|JobStartChecklist-PlantPrestart|JobStartChecklist-StartCard|JobStartChecklist-VehicleMovementPlan|JobStartChecklist-WorkingatHeightsPermit|QAReview-JobStartFormSectionhasbeencompleted|QAReview-PlantPrestartAttached|QAReview-StartCardAttached|QAReview-Timesheetattachedandpopulated' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`uvw_jobs_all_attributes`
